title: Magical Algerian Beef Tagine
description: A hearty and aromatic stew originating from Algeria, slow-cooked in a clay pot with tender beef, snappy spices, and a hint of magic.

ingredients.name: Beef (sirloin or chuck), cut into 1-inch cubes

instructions: Heat oil in a clay pot over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef cubes, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, ginger, and garlic; cook for 1 minute.
Add the tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef broth and bring to a boil.
Cover and transfer to the oven; bake at 300°F for 2 1/2 hours.
Stir in salt and pepper to taste.
Sprinkle with parsley and serve over couscous.
